creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 184012
calculix-cgx as a shar file

CalculiX GraphiX is currently broken in the unified port because of incompatibilities between libstdc++ and libc++.

The main problem is that the command line tool has to be built with both fortran and openmp which involves GCC. calculix-cgx uses opengl as should instead be built with clang when possible. Separating the ports is consistent with the way upstream distributes this (in two tarballs, make the package more flexible and easier to maintain.

cgx now doesn't coredump.
